sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`InstanceId`,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Organization`,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Department`,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`First Name`,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Middle Initial`,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Name`,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Customer Login ID`,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Phone Number`,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Internet E-mail`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
where (
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID) 
)

SELECT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS Status,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status_Reason` AS Status_Reason,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Impact` AS Impact,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Urgency` AS Urgency,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS Priority,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority Weight` AS Priority_Weight
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
where (
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Source`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Service Type` AS IncidentType,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Description` AS Summary,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Detailed Decription` AS Notes
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
where (
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
  `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Direct Contact First Name`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Direct Contact Last Name`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Department`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Organization`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
where (
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Company`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Organization`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
where (
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
  `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` AS Company,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Region` AS Region,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Site Group` AS Site_Group,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Site` AS Site
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
where (
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Resolution Category`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Resolution`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status_Reason`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
where (
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
  `HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 1` AS 'Tier 1',
  `HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 2`AS 'Tier 2',
  `HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 3` AS 'Tier 3'
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
where ( 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT
  `HPD:Help Desk`.`Product Categorization Tier 1` AS 'Tier 1',
  `HPD:Help Desk`.`Product Categorization Tier 2` AS 'Tier 2',
  `HPD:Help Desk`.`Product Categorization Tier 3` AS 'Tier 3',
  `HPD:Help Desk`.`Manufacturer`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Product Name`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Product Model/Version`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
where (
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` in ($IncidentID))

SELECT 
`HPD:Associations`.`Request ID01` AS WorkOrderID,
 `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Work Order Type`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Summary`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Business Service`,
    `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Support Group Name` AS mgrsgp,
   `WOI:WorkOrder`.`ASGRP` AS Assigneesgp,
   `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Customer Company`,
 `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Customer Organization`,
    `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Status`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Status Reason`,
   `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Priority`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Associations`
inner join `WOI:WorkOrder` 
ON `HPD:Associations`.`Request ID01` = `WOI:WorkOrder`.`Request ID`
where `HPD:Associations`.`Form Name01`= 'WOI:WorkOrder' 
and `HPD:Associations`.`Request ID02` in ($IncidentID)

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` FROM `HPD:Help Desk` WHERE  `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` in ($company) and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` in ($priority) and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ($Status) and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` in ($AssignedGroup) LIMIT 10"}
list.label: Incident Id
list.name: IncidentID
list.query: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` FROM `HPD:Help Desk` WHERE  `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` in ($company) and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` in ($priority) and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` in ($Status) and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` in ($AssignedGroup) LIMIT 10"}
